tasks.title: Assignment Due
tasks.notes:
Write testing cases for the following:

    For each of the requirements in your Requirement Tracibility Matrix (RTM), write a test case associated with that specific requirement
    Think about 3 unit test cases, and develop an automation script for those test cases
        Identify the test cases for which the automation test is generated
        provide the script as a notepad or in the word
        Provide the screen capture for the automation testing completion
            Please save this script, at the end of the semester, this will be a part of your CI/CD pipeline during your project code submission
